title: verbascum thapsus var. montanum
intro: Verbascum thapsus var. montanum, also known as the Mountain Mullein, is a biennial plant belonging to the Figwort family, characterized by its tall stems and large, yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Mountain Mullein include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
